sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁρκίζω

- Transliteration: Horkizo

- Phonetic: hor-kid'-zo

- Definition:

1. to force to take an oath, to administer an oath to

2. to adjure (solemnly implore)

- Origin: from G3727

- TDNT entry: 12:42,7

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G3727; to put on oath that is make swear; by analogy to solemnly enjoin: - adjure charge.
